name: ddia-systems
description: Design data systems by understanding storage engines, replication, partitioning, transactions, and consistency models. Use when the user mentions "database choice", "replication lag", "partitioning strategy", "consistency vs availability", "stream processing", "ACID transactions", "eventual consistency", or "LSM tree vs B-tree". Also trigger when choosing between SQL and NoSQL, designing data pipelines, or debugging distributed system consistency issues. Covers data models, batch/stream processi
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 这是一个分布式数据系统的设计知识库，能帮你解决数据库选型、一致性调试等架构难题，适合在纠结分区复制策略或设计数据管道时参考。
